command: fastp --in1 JK2782_T1_polyG_trim_R1.fastq.gz --in2 JK2782_T1_polyG_trim_R2.fastq.gz --out1 JK2782_T1_polyG_trim_R1.fastp.fastq.gz --out2 JK2782_T1_polyG_trim_R2.fastp.fastq.gz --json JK2782_T1_polyG_trim.fastp.json --html JK2782_T1_polyG_trim.fastp.html --thread 4 --detect_adapter_for_pe --trim_poly_g --poly_g_min_len 0 --length_required 25
